message: SSG's hidden weakness is a context-amplified game-script lock, not a one-stat gap.
why_hidden: The original run-conversion problem remains when opponent starter handedness is attached.
key_evidence: outfielders combined for fewer than 3 RBI + opponent scored 6+ runs + opponent starter was right-handed: 20 games, win% 0.100, run diff -5.10, hidden lift 0.088
candidate_translation: Pitcher first for game-script floor; hitter screen must be RHP-resistant and run-conversion stable.

message: The hitter filter should punish RHP-side run-killing outs, not only low OPS.
why_hidden: GDP/CS friction in OF/DH slots worsens the RHP-side low-conversion tail.
key_evidence: OF table-setter OBP was .250 or lower + opponent starter was right-handed + OF/DH slots had at least 1 GDP/CS run-kill event: 9 games, win% 0.000, run diff -5.11, hidden lift 0.286
candidate_translation: Add GDP avoidance, baserunning decision quality, and contact shape to the OF/DH screen.

message: SSG's no-recovery games are amplified when extra-out damage meets a high-leverage OF run-conversion void.
why_hidden: The defensive/pitching leak is hidden because it is clearer through unearned-run states than raw error count.
key_evidence: high-leverage OF lineup slots had 0 RBI + SSG allowed at least 1 unearned run: 8 games, win% 0.000, run diff -4.50, hidden lift 0.294
candidate_translation: Pitcher screen should value traffic command and extra-out resilience; hitter screen should preserve rescue value.

message: Against top opponents, SSG has almost no margin for short starts plus high-leverage OF silence.
why_hidden: The issue is not just losing to good teams; it is the specific pathway where starter length and OF conversion vanish together.
key_evidence: starter failed to complete 5 innings + high-leverage OF lineup slots had 0 RBI + opponent ranked top 3 by current 2026 win percentage: 6 games, win% 0.000, run diff -5.83, hidden lift 0.308
candidate_translation: Stress-test candidates for performance retention against playoff-level opponents and right-handed starter scripts.
